title: Users
intro: Create login accounts here. Dispatcher role appears in Dispatchers; Sales Manager and Senior Sales Manager appear in Workers.
errPasswordNew: Password is required for new users
confirmDelete: Delete this login account? Linked dispatcher/worker rows will be deactivated.
clearDataWarningIntro: The following business data will be permanently deleted:
clearDataWarningItem2: Inventory, packages, products, and finance records
clearDataWarningItem3: Customers, dispatchers, workers, and other operational data
clearDataWarningKept: Kept: Django superuser logins and passwords.
clearDataSuccess: Database cleared. Roles were reset — all users should log in again.
